description: Gates the @launchdarkly/observability plugin (errors, web vitals, traces) injected into LDProvider. Control path (flag off) omits the plugin entirely, preserving existing behavior.
control_path: enableObservability=false → plugins=[] → LDProvider initialized without observability plugin
treatment_path: enableObservability=true → plugins=[new Observability()] → LDProvider initialized with observability plugin
